name: ln-acme
description: LiveNetworks unified frontend library — CSS framework and vanilla JS components

scripts.build:demos: npm run build:demo-index && npm run build:demo-admin && npm run build:demo-docuflow
scripts.build:demo-admin: sass demo/admin/src/admin.scss demo/admin/dist/admin.css --no-source-map --style=compressed && cp demo/admin/src/demo.js demo/admin/dist/demo.js && node demo/admin/src/build-pages.mjs
